zh.Pattingham, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾帕廷加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Annis Wedon於大約1544年出生在英國波克夏望塔時，她的父親Robert Wedon22歲，母親Mrs Jone Wedon22歲。她於1561年5月7日與John Carter在英國波克夏望塔結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Pattingham, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾帕廷加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annis Wedon于大约1544年出生在英国波克夏望塔时，她的父亲Robert Wedon22岁，母亲Mrs Jone Wedon22岁。她于1561年5月7日与John Carter在英国波克夏望塔结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Wedon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or habitational name composed of a variant of the (placename) element ved ‘wood, forest’ + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.

nameMeanings.name: Annis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and English: a medieval vernacular form of   Agnes  , which gave rise to a surname. Its modern use as a given name is probably at least in part a transferred use of the surname as well as a revival of the medieval given name.

variants.name: Annice
meanings: Variant spelling of Annis , based on the numerous women's names ending in -ice.

variants.name: Annys
meanings: and English: a medieval vernacular form of   Agnes  , which gave rise to a surname. Its modern use as a given name is probably at least in part a transferred use of the surname as well as a revival of the medieval given name.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Annis Wedon was born about 1544, in Wantage, Berkshire, England, her father, Robert Wedon, was 22 and her mother, Mrs Jone Wedon, was 22. She married John Carter on 7 May 1561, in Wantage, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annis Wedon est née environ 1544, à Wantage, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Wedon, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mrs Jone Wedon, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Carter le 7 mai 1561, à Wantage, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annis Wedon um 1544 in Wantage, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Wedon 22 und ihre Mutter Mrs Jone Wedon 22. Sie hat am 7. Mai 1561 in Wantage, Berkshire, England John Carter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annis Wedon è nata il circa 1544 nel Wantage, Berkshire, England, sua padre, Robert Wedon, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mrs Jone Wedon, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Carter il 7 maggio 1561, nel Wantage, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Annis Wedonが約1544年にイギリスバークシュアイアワンタッジで生まれた時，父Robert Wedonは22歳，母Mrs Jone Wedonは22歳であった。1561年5月7日にイギリスバークシュアイアワンタッジでJohn Carterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Annis Wedon(이)가 대략 1544년 영국 버크실르 완타지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Wedon(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Jone Wedon(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1561년 5월 7일 영국 버크실르 완타지에서 John Carter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Annis Wedon nasceu aproximadamente 1544, em Wantage, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Wedon, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Jone Wedon, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Carter em 7 de maio de 1561, em Wantage, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annis Wedon родилась около 1544 г. в местности вантадж, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Wedon было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Jone Wedon, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Carter 7 мая 1561 г. в местности вантадж, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annis Wedon nació aproximadamente 1544, en Wantage, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Wedon, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mrs Jone Wedon, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Carter el 7 de mayo de 1561, en Wantage, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas.
